homepage.features.powered-by-mdx.text.message: Save time and focus on text documents. Simply write docs and blog posts with MDX, and Docusaurus builds them into static HTML files ready to be served. You can even embed React components in your Markdown thanks to MDX.

homepage.features.built-using-react.text.message: Extend and customize your project's layout by writing React components. Leverage the pluggable architecture, and design your own site while reusing the same data created by Docusaurus plugins.

homepage.features.ready-for-translations.message: Localization comes out-of-the-box. Use git, Crowdin, or any other translation manager to translate your docs and deploy them individually.

homepage.features.document-versioning.te.message: Support users on all versions of your project. Document versioning helps you keep documentation in sync with project releases.

homepage.features.content-search.text.message: Make it easy for your community to find what they need in your documentation. We proudly support Algolia documentation search.

homepage.quotes.christopher-chedeau.titl.description: Title of quote of Christopher Chedeau on the home page

homepage.quotes.christopher-chedeau.message: I've helped open source many projects at Facebook and every one needed a website. They all had very similar constraints: the documentation should be written in markdown and be deployed via GitHub pages. I’m so glad that Docusaurus now exists so that I don’t have to spend a week each time spinning up a new one.
homepage.quotes.christopher-chedeau.description: Quote of Christopher Chedeau on the home page

homepage.quotes.hector-ramos.title.description: Title of quote of Hector Ramos on the home page

homepage.quotes.hector-ramos.message: Open source contributions to the React Native docs have skyrocketed after our move to Docusaurus. The docs are now hosted on a small repo in plain markdown, with none of the clutter that a typical static site generator would require. Thanks Slash!
homepage.quotes.hector-ramos.description: Quote of Hector Ramos on the home page

homepage.quotes.risky-vetter.title.description: Title of quote of Ricky Vetter on the home page

homepage.quotes.risky-vetter.message: Docusaurus has been a great choice for the ReasonML family of projects. It makes our documentation consistent, i18n-friendly, easy to maintain, and friendly for new contributors.
homepage.quotes.risky-vetter.description: Quote of Ricky Vetter on the home page

homepage.banner.title.message: 让 Web 进入你身处的空间

homepage.banner.desc.message: 在广泛采用的开放标准 Web 技术中引入原生空间应用的 UI 能力和新一代开发范式，让 Web 突破屏幕进入现实空间，让主流 Web 生态和 Web 开发者能无缝进入空间计算和多模态 AI 的时代。

homepage.loading.description.message: 正在加载首页首屏所需的媒体资源，完成后将展示动画和滚动交互。

homepage.section1.title.message: 一个应用，覆盖所有设备，从屏幕走向空间

homepage.section1.desc.message: 一套代码同时交付桌面和移动端的 2D UI，并在空间计算设备上进一步解锁空间化 UI。

homepage.section2.title.message: 释放空间创造力，让你的 Web 从 2D 扩展到 3D

homepage.section2.card1.desc.message: 把拥挤在不透明平面上的网页内容拆分成能充分利用空间的独立悬浮面片，动态半透明材质的 UI 能自然地叠加在现实世界之上。

homepage.section2.card2.title.message: 抬升 HTML 元素，解锁纵深

homepage.section2.card2.desc.message: 把任意 HTML 元素从平面页面中抬起，无论它是静态还是动态内容，都能沿 Z 轴定位、布局和形变，让界面能超越宽高利用真实世界的纵深。

homepage.section2.card3.title.message: 多空间场景，原生空间计算能力

homepage.section2.card3.desc.message: 把组成 Web App 的多个窗口升级成操作系统管理的空间场景容器，以独立空间应用形态运行，自动获得空间计算能力。

homepage.section2.card4.title.message: 接入真正的 3D 内容，融合不同维度

homepage.section2.card4.desc.message: 引入具备真实体积的 3D 元素，让它们与 2D 元素无缝嵌套和布局，再通过 3D 引擎驱动动态、可交互的 3D 内容。

homepage.section3.title.message: 继续写 Web，直接交付空间应用

homepage.section3.desc.message: 继续使用你已经熟悉的 React、CSS、JS 和 Web 开发工具。WebSpatial 只为现有 Web 技术栈补充一组精简的空间 API，可以直接接入标准 Web 项目，以极少代码改动解锁原生级空间能力。

homepage.section4.desc.message: 交付空间应用所需的一切，基于你已经在使用的那些工具。

homepage.section4.card1.desc.message: 对 HTML、CSS 和 JS 的开放且精简的扩展，为 Web 增加抬升、多场景、3D 容器等空间能力。

homepage.section4.card2.desc.message: 一个可直接接入 React 项目的库，立刻解锁 WebSpatial API，让你继续用熟悉的 React 组件和现有生态来构建空间应用。

homepage.section4.card3.desc.message: 一个 CLI 工具，可将启用了 WebSpatial 的 React 项目打包成可安装的原生空间应用，用平台专属的 App Shell 包裹 Web 代码并运行 WebSpatial API。

homepage.bottom.title.message: 开始使用 WebSpatial 构建应用

homepage.meta.description.message: WebSpatial 是一套空间 API 和开箱即用的 SDK，可在跨平台场景下把标准 2D Web 生态扩展到空间计算，让整个基于 HTML/CSS 的 Web 世界进入空间时代，在保留原有优势的同时获得接近原生应用（如 visionOS 应用）的空间能力。
